text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What a beautiful clover. Just looking at it soothes my soul...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose heart over something like this, but my
legs just won't move how they should...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I push too hard, however, I'll only end up
injuring myself, and this will be all for naught.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm going to head back to the dorm
early today. I need to take advantage of any free
time I can to let my body rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion seems rather exhausted. Maybe I
need to revise her race schedule.
